title: 我想买一条裤子
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yì tiáo kùzi
description_uz: «Qaysi rang yoqadi?» — kiyim do'konida xaridor va sotuvchi o'rtasida suhbat. Bu dialog rang aytish, narxni muhokama qilish va arzonroqini so'rashni o'rgatadi. Tanish mavzu, do'konda asqotadigan foydali so'zlar. Rol o'ynash va gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Какой цвет тебе нравится?» — разговор двух людей в магазине о выборе одежды. Этот диалог учит называть цвета, обсуждать цену и просить что-нибудь подешевле. Близкая тема, полезная лексика для магазина. Отлично для ролевых игр и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «What color do you like?» — two people in a shop talking through a clothing choice. This dialogue teaches naming colors, discussing price, and asking for something cheaper. Familiar topic, useful shopping vocabulary. Great for role-play and building speaking confidence.

sentences.text_translation_en: What would you like to buy?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yì tiáo kù zi.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to buy a pair of pants.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xǐ huan shén me yán sè?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hēi sè huò zhě lán sè dōu kě yǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Qora yoki ko'k — ikkalasi ham bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Black or blue, either is fine.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhè tiáo hēi sè de zěn me yàng?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 看起来不错，可以试一下吗？
sentences.pinyin: Kàn qǐ lái bú cuò, kě yǐ shì yí xià ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: They look nice, can I try them on?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 当然可以。试衣间在那边。
sentences.pinyin: Dāng rán kě yǐ. Shì yī jiān zài nà biān.
sentences.text_translation_en: Of course. The fitting room is over there.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè tiáo kù zi yǒu diǎnr xiǎo.
sentences.text_translation_en: These pants are a bit small.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那您试一下这条大一点的。
sentences.pinyin: Nà nín shì yí xià zhè tiáo dà yì diǎn de.
sentences.text_translation: Unda mana bu kattaroq shimni kiyib ko'ring.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then try these slightly bigger ones.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, zhè tiáo hěn hé shì. Duō shao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, bu juda mos keldi. Qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, эти как раз впору. Сколько стоят?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, these fit well. How much are they?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiàn hái yǒu bié de yán sè ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do these come in other colors?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hái yǒu lán sè hé huī sè.
sentences.text_translation_en: We also have blue and gray.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng le, hēi sè jiù hǎo.
sentences.speaker: A
